import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"API health check"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/financing/v1/health"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



If the API back-end services is up and running, you receive HTTP status code 204. In other cases, you receive one of the following errors:

| Status code | Code            |
| ----------- | --------------- |
| 500         | SERVICE_FAILED  |
| 504         | SERVICE_TIMEOUT |

> Note: resource requires valid access_token in the HTTP header of the request


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"timeout","in":"query","description":"timeout","required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","default":2000}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"*/*":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"errors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"attribute":{"type":"string"},"code":{"type":"string"},"message":{"type":"string"},"severity":{"type":"string","enum":["ERROR","WARN","INFO"]},"ticketId":{"type":"string"}},"title":"Issue"}}},"title":"IssueList"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
